html:
Exclusive to:  
This content is available only after activating the Shadow Rift

“While on the ground, it can be activated to create a barrier that protects survivors from rain and rain like effects.”

-

The Umbralla is a craftable clothing Item exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in From Beyond. It can only be crafted while next to a Shadowcraft Plinth, and requires 5 Pure Horror and 1 Dark Tatters to craft.

The Umbralla provides 100% protection from Wetness and slows down Overheating on par with the Eyebrella. While equipped, the Umbralla lowers Sanity by 3.3 per minute.

Additionally, the Umbralla protects against all Acid Rain effects, and while equipped during Acid Rain it restores its own durability at a rate of 6.6% per day, completely eliminating the loss of durability.

While on the ground, the Umbralla can be activated to create an area-of-effect dome with a radius of 16 wall units, which offers protection in a somewhat different manner. Its effect simply causes precipitation to not occur within the dome's area. This means:

  • There is no Overheating protection within the dome.
  • Acid Rain does not restore the Umbralla's durability while activated on the ground.
  • Lunar Hail does not fall at all within the dome's area.

While the Umbralla is deployed in this way, it depletes its durability and produces a negative sanity aura in the same area as its dome, ranging from -0.1/min to -27.5/min sanity drain depending on the character's distance from the Umbralla.

The Umbralla is a level 3 item for Maxwell's Shadow Puppets.

When the Umbralla's durability reaches 0%, it does not disappear; instead, it is unequipped and can no longer be equipped until repaired. It can be fully repaired by one Void Repair Kit.

Trivia

  • The Umbralla was introduced in the Terrors Below update.
  • "Umbralla" is a portmanteau of "umbrella" and "umbra", the Latin word for "shade".
  • The area-of-effect rain barrier was added in the Skill Spotlight: Wormwood, Wolfgang, Woodie update.
  • Wortox's quote is a reference to the 1912 play Pygmalion by George Bernard Shaw, in which the character Henry Higgins is giving elocution lessons to the main character, asking her to say: "The rain in Spain stays mainly on the plain".

Gallery

  • Umbralla Concept art from Rhymes with Play.
  • Dropped Broken Umbralla on water.
  • Umbralla activated on the ground.
  • Umbralla Equipped.

–Walter
“At least it will keep me dry.”
–Wanda

The Umbralla is a craftable clothing Item exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in From Beyond. It can only be crafted while next to a Shadowcraft Plinth, and requires 5 Pure Horror and 1 Dark Tatters to craft.
The Umbralla provides 100% protection from Wetness and slows down Overheating on par with the Eyebrella. While equipped, the Umbralla lowers Sanity by 3.3 per minute.

While on the ground, the Umbralla can be activated to create an area-of-effect dome with a radius of 16 wall units, which offers protection in a somewhat different manner. Its effect simply causes precipitation to not occur within the dome's area. This means:
There is no Overheating protection within the dome.
Acid Rain does not restore the Umbralla's durability while activated on the ground.
Lunar Hail does not fall at all within the dome's area.
While the Umbralla is deployed in this way, it depletes its durability and produces a negative sanity aura in the same area as its dome, ranging from -0.1/min to -27.5/min sanity drain depending on the character's distance from the Umbralla.
The Umbralla is a level 3 item for Maxwell's Shadow Puppets.
When the Umbralla's durability reaches 0%, it does not disappear; instead, it is unequipped and can no longer be equipped until repaired. It can be fully repaired by one Void Repair Kit.
Trivia[edit | edit source]
The Umbralla was introduced in the Terrors Below update.
"Umbralla" is a portmanteau of "umbrella" and "umbra", the Latin word for "shade".
The area-of-effect rain barrier was added in the Skill Spotlight: Wormwood, Wolfgang, Woodie update.
Wortox's quote is a reference to the 1912 play Pygmalion by George Bernard Shaw, in which the character Henry Higgins is giving elocution lessons to the main character, asking her to say: "The rain in Spain stays mainly on the plain".

The '''Umbralla''' is a craftable clothing Item exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]'', introduced in ''[[From Beyond]]''. It can only be crafted while next to a [[Shadowcraft Plinth]], and requires 5 [[Pure Horror]] and 1 [[Dark Tatters]] to craft.

The Umbralla provides 100% protection from [[Wetness]] and slows down [[Overheating]] on par with the [[Eyebrella]]. While equipped, the Umbralla lowers [[Sanity]] by 3.3{{Sanity}} per minute.

Additionally, the Umbralla protects against all [[Acid Rain]] effects, and while equipped during Acid Rain it restores its own durability at a rate of 6.6% per day, completely eliminating the loss of durability.

While on the ground, the Umbralla can be activated to create an area-of-effect dome with a radius of 16 wall units, which offers protection in a somewhat different manner. Its effect simply causes precipitation to not occur within the dome's area. This means:
* There is no Overheating protection within the dome.
* Acid Rain does not restore the Umbralla's durability while activated on the ground.
* Lunar Hail does not fall at all within the dome's area.
While the Umbralla is deployed in this way, it depletes its durability and produces a negative sanity aura in the same area as its dome, ranging from -0.1{{Sanity}}/min to -27.5{{Sanity}}/min sanity drain depending on the character's distance from the Umbralla.

The Umbralla is a level 3 item for [[Maxwell/Don't Starve Together|Maxwell]]'s [[Shadow Puppet]]s.

When the Umbralla's durability reaches 0%, it does not disappear; instead, it is unequipped and can no longer be equipped until repaired. It can be fully repaired by one [[Void Repair Kit]].

== {{Pic|32|Placeholder}} Trivia ==
* The Umbralla was introduced in the ''[[From Beyond#Terrors Below|Terrors Below]]'' update.
* "Umbralla" is a portmanteau of "umbrella" and "umbra", the Latin word for "shade".
* The area-of-effect rain barrier was added in the ''[[Skill Spotlight Update#Wormwood, Wolfgang, Woodie|Skill Spotlight: Wormwood, Wolfgang, Woodie]]'' update.
* [[Wortox/Don't Starve Together|Wortox]]'s quote is a reference to the 1912 play [[wikipedia:Pygmalion_(play)|Pygmalion]] by George Bernard Shaw, in which the character Henry Higgins is giving elocution lessons to the main character, asking her to say: "The rain in Spain stays mainly on the plain".
